productDescription: DevPulse is a developer productivity platform that integrates with GitHub, GitLab, and Jira to provide real-time engineering metrics, sprint health dashboards, and AI-powered code review suggestions.
valueProposition: Engineering leaders use DevPulse to reduce cycle time by 40% and identify bottlenecks before they impact delivery. No setup required — connects to your existing tools in 5 minutes.
callToAction: Would you be open to a quick 15-minute demo this week?
